mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, suite_code, source_object_code, target_object_code, relation_type, relation_name, source_field_code, target_field_code, relation_config, description, status, sort_order, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS id, r.suite_code AS suiteCode, r.source_object_code AS sourceObjectCode, source_obj.object_name AS sourceObjectName, r.target_object_code AS targetObjectCode, target_obj.object_name AS targetObjectName, r.relation_type AS relationType, r.relation_name AS relationName, r.source_field_code AS sourceFieldCode, r.target_field_code AS targetFieldCode, r.relation_config AS relationConfig, r.description AS description, r.status AS status, r.sort_order AS sortOrder, r.create_time AS createTime, r.update_time AS updateTime FROM ai_business_object_relation r LEFT JOIN ai_business_object source_obj ON source_obj.tenant_id = r.tenant_id AND source_obj.suite_code = r.suite_code AND source_obj.object_code = r.source_object_code LEFT JOIN ai_business_object target_obj ON target_obj.tenant_id = r.tenant_id AND target_obj.suite_code = r.suite_code AND target_obj.object_code = r.target_object_code WHERE r.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND r.suite_code = #{suiteCode} AND (r.source_object_code = #{objectCode} OR r.target_object_code = #{objectCode}) ORDER BY r.sort_order ASC, r.id ASC
